title: Missouri Revised Statutes § 226.070 - Attorney general shall advise commission, when
text:
226.070.  Attorney general shall advise commission, when. — When directed by the governor, or requested in writing by the commission, the attorney general shall advise the commission and shall assist the legal adviser of the commission in any proceeding in any of the courts of the state in which the commission is a party.
(RSMo 1939 § 8747) 
Prior revision: 1929 § 8099
